text:
Author: thompsa
Date: Tue Jun 22 21:01:40 2010
New Revision: 209444
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/base/209444

Log:
  Add new device id.
  
  PR:		usb/146907

Modified:
  head/sys/dev/usb/net/if_rue.c

Modified: head/sys/dev/usb/net/if_rue.c
==============================================================================
--- head/sys/dev/usb/net/if_rue.c	Tue Jun 22 20:57:48 2010	(r209443)
+++ head/sys/dev/usb/net/if_rue.c	Tue Jun 22 21:01:40 2010	(r209444)
@@ -112,6 +112,7 @@ SYSCTL_INT(_hw_usb_rue, OID_AUTO, debug,
 static const struct usb_device_id rue_devs[] = {
 	{USB_VPI(USB_VENDOR_MELCO, USB_PRODUCT_MELCO_LUAKTX, 0)},
 	{USB_VPI(USB_VENDOR_REALTEK, USB_PRODUCT_REALTEK_USBKR100, 0)},
+	{USB_VPI(USB_VENDOR_OQO, USB_PRODUCT_OQO_ETHER01, 0)},
 };
 
 /* prototypes */
